name: Magical Runes
short_description: Three ruthless kings have declared war on your lands!
detailed_description:
Three ruthless kings have declared war on your lands!
Their merciless armies march forward, drowning the sacred swamps in blood and leaving only ruin in their wake. But the power of ancient magic still lingers beneath the surface—and it’s up to you to awaken it.

Take command of mystical artifacts, each imbued with powerful spells, and turn the swamplands into a deadly labyrinth for the invaders. These enchanted relics will automatically strike down approaching enemies, but to survive the growing onslaught, you’ll need to gather magic crystals and use them wisely.

Upgrade your spells to unleash even more devastating effects, unlock new types of arcane magic, or boost your loyal assistant who tirelessly collects resources on your behalf. Strategic thinking is key—should you enhance your defenses, empower your helper, or unlock an entirely new magical force?

This isn’t just another tower defense game. It’s a magical war where every decision matters. Will you flood the enemy in waves of elemental fury, or watch your homeland burn under their steel?

Game Features:

  • Stunning hand-drawn visuals that bring the magical swamps to life

  • Addictive and strategic gameplay full of action and decision-making

  • Deep progression system with spell upgrades, magic types, and helper improvements

  • A dark, immersive fantasy world where magic fights back against tyranny

Get ready to defend your land with everything you've got—because the war has already begun!
